Description:
Ballistics of 57x348SR caliber UOR-281(U) rounds, fired from automatic anti-aircraft gun S-60, and S-68 mounted on the SPAAG ZSU-57 "Sparka". 

Projectile		Shot	P.mcp	M.V.
		kg	kgf/cm²	m/s
UOR-281(U)		2.82	3100	1000 m/s
UBR-281(U)		2.85	3100	1000 m/s

Cartridge Loads 1.16kg of 11/7 grains, with geometry:
Geometry		Arch Width		Perforation Diameter			Length
7-perf Cylinder	1.00-1.15 mm			0.45-0.65 mm			11.5-15.5mm

Dimensions:
Gun Length:			4368 mm (breech block to muzzle booster)
Barrel Length:			4110 mm
Projectile Travel:			3624 mm
Chamber Length:			371 mm (breech face to start of rifling)
Occupied by Grain:			298 mm
Chambrage:			1.905
